title: Add WebSocket real-time communication to Next.js with Socket.io
summary: Set up Socket.io with a custom Next.js server, emit and listen to events client-side, implement rooms, and handle reconnection and authentication.
declaration: I will add WebSocket real-time communication using Socket.io. This requires a custom Node.js server — it cannot run in the Next.js edge runtime or on Vercel's serverless functions. If you need edge-compatible real-time, I can use Upstash Redis pub/sub or Ably instead.
